headline: Digital Payment Today - OwlTing Expands Digital Payment Reach with New Enterprise Clients
summary: OwlTing Group has announced significant strides in its digital payment platform, OwlPay Harbor, by securing over 20 enterprise clients in the first quarter of 2026. These clients, which include fintech, remittance, nonprofit, and cross-border B2B payment services, represent over $5 billion in annual payment volume. This development marks a critical phase in OwlTing's transformation into a fully operational monetization entity, leveraging a regulated digital currency settlement infrastructure...
